discussion.tldr: The week's dominant thread was the fallout over Zero's PnL/transparency (the DOGE bag + Barncore's public post) — but it's clearly winding down: lots of support, an apology or two, one departure, and Zero re-centering ("more focused, different approach"). Beyond the drama, the new terminal/dashboard drew strong praise (Transcript mode a hit, Notion retired), the Weekly Market Update dropped and an Instagram page launched. Members floated fresh stock ideas — water/CWCO, FDP, PLTR, WEN — amid the ongoing DOGE/alt-season and BTC-Wyckoff debate.

stats.note: Hub setups + Moneytaur posts were all already digested previously; the only genuinely-new pipeline item is MRNA TP1 hit (06-23).

topics.topic: Zero PnL / transparency fallout — winding down
topics.summary: Days-long debate over Zero not publicly announcing the DOGE bag sale: trust vs. personal accountability. Mostly resolved — strong support, an apology from @OxAdam9, one member (@YogifromNL) leaving despite an active sub. Zero: 'getting back on track, more focused, different approach.'

Heavy praise for the new terminal/dashboard — Transcript mode and video-in-terminal called standouts. Notion is retired (all redirected into the terminal), an official Instagram launched, and the Weekly Market Update dropped. Feature requests: a font/theme picker and an auto AI summary of lives.
@Dheerane floated water ETFs/stocks (a water-crisis theme heating up). Zero replied he's watching CWCO (Consolidated Water), not an ETF — and pointed to ~$26 as the level he's eyeing.

Will DOGE / alts survive the bear? Seen as a crowded trade with weak spot delta; views split between 'most alts die' and 'high-MC/institution-owned ones recover'. XLM's HTF BB move cited as the playbook; XRP/ZEC/AVAX discussed.

Is BTC a Wyckoff accumulation? Debate on a Spring below 60k (possibly 40s) vs. a schematic-2 with no spring that strands sidelined buyers; some looking to TP longs and rotate to shorts. Longer-bear-into-2027 risk raised.
Zero's oil long: SL ~71.5, sweated the wick to 72 on HL, still in. Members charting USO 1M/3M BB levels and the prior oil rejection.

Practical thread on prop accounts — effective capital vs. max drawdown, why 1%/trade can really be ~16% of usable capital, and curbing revenge trading (2-loss daily stop, 3-trade cap, small-account discipline). @FruitCake16 shared turning $2-3 into ~$197 by only trading extremes.

Fresh tickers floated by members: FDP (Del Monte), PLTR (Palantir — 50% fib below price for a swing long, charted), WEN (Wendy's). NFLX also in play — Cooperr entered; Zero says it's part of the plan he highlighted on the last lives, targets to come in the terminal after closure.

@KonigNeit asked whether MRNA still needs a weekly retest after the daily bounced sub-60. Zero: the weekly TF has its own structure — LTF can front-run but doesn't invalidate the HTF, so keep the weekly retest scenario on the table until weekly structure says otherwise.
WMU published to the app/terminal (library/weekly-market-update). Members called it the one must-read of the week.

payload.note: TP1 $68 hit (2026-06-23). Scaling out + trailing toward $83 / $95. Weekly-retest scenario still on the table per Zero's Q&A.
